item.title: Oruka Psoriasis Drug
item.description:
• Summary: Oruka Therapeutics reported positive Phase 2 results for its psoriasis drug, which showed superiority over Skyrizi (risankizumab) in terms of skin clearance. Analysts hailed the data as an 'outright win' and projected blockbuster potential. The drug, if approved, could offer an oral alternative to injectable biologics for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis.
  • MoAs: Mechanism not fully disclosed; likely a small-molecule immunomodulator targeting key psoriasis pathways (e.g., IL-17 or TYK2 inhibition by analogy to competitors).
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, Endpoints News, Fierce Biotech, STAT News
